notes: Iteration 22: 4 high-signal sources focused on Agent Skills bundles + formal context elements. addyosmani production lifecycle bundle (24 skills + personas + checklists), official agentskills.io spec, awesome catalog (1000+ examples), and SSSOM ontology mapping standard (exemplar for SSSOM/SHACL-style context in bundles). Strong coverage of lifecycle taxonomies, verification rules, and cross-agent portability. Gap: SHACL adoption in agent skills remains low.
